session.user: Run `uv run prettier --write docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md` and report results. Do NOT fix anything else, just format these two files and report.
session.assistant: I'll run the prettier formatter on those two files and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Format two markdown files with prettier

session.assistant:
**prettier passed**: Both files formatted successfully
- `docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` — formatted in 68ms - `docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md` — formatted in 20ms
